creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am having trouble installing Proton 7.0.4 per the instructions in point 3 of the pkg-message "In Steam install Proton 7.0 (appid 1887720)". I cannot find a way to do this directly in Steam.

Instead, the following call in the shell works quite well: "steam steam://install/1887720". This starts Steam and the installation of Proton 7 is executed.

A more detailed description in point 3, how within Steam the installation is started, would probably be helpful? Maybe the installation from the shell could also be described as an alternative?
